ivf.title: The IVF Journey
ivf.subtitle: If nature is taking a little longer, IVF is a hopeful, well-trodden path — and we'll walk every step of it with you.
ivf.intro: Here you'll find the whole IVF process laid out gently, step by step — what happens, how long it takes, and what it may cost in Singapore. Take your time, tap through at your own pace, and know we're here to give you as much information as you need.
ivf.reassure: You're not behind, and you're not alone — thousands of Singapore families grow this way every year. One step at a time.
ivf.stepDisclaimer: Informational only, not medical advice · every clinic tailors the plan to you · timings are typical, not fixed.
ivf.step0_what: Your first visit with a fertility specialist. They review your history and run a few tests — hormone bloods (like AMH), an ultrasound, and a semen analysis — to design a plan made just for you.
ivf.step0_note: This is your team getting to know you. No question is too small — bring your list and ask them everything.
ivf.step1_what: Daily hormone injections gently encourage your ovaries to grow several eggs at once. You'll pop in for short monitoring scans and blood tests every few days so your team can fine-tune the dose.
ivf.step1_note: The injections sound daunting, but most people find their rhythm within a few days. You've got this.
ivf.step2_what: A final 'trigger' injection ripens your eggs. About 36 hours later, the eggs are collected in a short day procedure under light sedation — you rest a while, then go home the same day.
ivf.step2_note: It's quicker than most expect. Plan a cosy rest day and someone kind to take you home.
ivf.step3_what: Your eggs meet sperm in the lab — either standard IVF, or ICSI, where a single sperm is placed into each egg. Embryologists nurture the embryos and watch them grow for three to five days.
ivf.step3_note: Behind the scenes, a whole team of specialists is quietly cheering your embryos on.
ivf.step4_what: A healthy embryo is gently placed into your womb — a quick, gentle procedure that usually needs no anaesthetic. Extra good-quality embryos can be frozen for future tries.
ivf.step4_note: A tiny seed of hope, settled right where it belongs.
ivf.step5_what: Now you wait, with medication to support the womb lining. After roughly two weeks, a blood test (beta-hCG) checks for pregnancy — far more reliable than an early home test.
ivf.step5_note: The hardest wait of all. Be gentle with yourself — rest, distract, and lean on your people.
ivf.step6_what: A positive result leads to an early viability scan a couple of weeks later. If this cycle doesn't work, your team reviews everything with you and plans the next step — often using the embryos you've frozen.
ivf.step6_note: Whatever the result, you're not back at square one — and you are never doing this alone.
ivf.costTitle: What might IVF cost in Singapore?
ivf.costIntro: Cost matters, and you deserve clear figures. Here's an honest, indicative picture — your clinic will give you an exact quote, and there's real government help to bring it down.
ivf.indicativeBadge: Indicative figures, 2026 — always confirm with MOH and your clinic
ivf.cost_public_note: One fresh cycle, before government co-funding
ivf.cost_fet_note: Per later transfer using a frozen embryo
ivf.supportHeading: Help that brings the cost down
ivf.support_cofund_note: Eligible Singaporean couples can receive co-funding for treatment at public ART centres (indicative up to ~S$7,700 per fresh cycle, less for frozen cycles). Confirm current limits and eligibility with MOH.
ivf.support_medisave_note: You can use MediSave to pay part of your treatment, within the per-cycle withdrawal limits. Confirm current caps with MOH/CPF.
ivf.verifyNote: These are indicative 2026 figures gathered from public sources to help you plan — not a quote. Fees, co-funding and MediSave limits change; always confirm the latest with MOH and your chosen clinic before making decisions.
ivf.closing: We're here to give you as much information as we can, whenever you need it. Take it one step at a time — hope is a plan too. 💛
ivf.closingSub: Every family's path is different. Whatever yours looks like, you're welcome here.

lossPage.eyebrow: A gentle space, just for you
lossPage.bannerBody: Whatever you're carrying today, you don't have to carry it by yourself. We're here — and so are people trained to help, any time you need them.
lossPage.intro: Every pregnancy journey is unique, and there is no blame in loss. Be gentle with yourself — there's no timeline for grief, and no wrong way to feel. You have not been forgotten here.
lossPage.affirm0: What you're feeling is valid — there's no right or wrong way to grieve.
lossPage.affirm1: This was not your fault. Loss is not a failure.
lossPage.affirm2: Take all the time you need. Grief doesn't follow a schedule.
lossPage.affirm3: You are still a parent, and your love still counts.
lossPage.affirm4: Leaning on others is strength, not weakness.
lossPage.affirm5: Whenever you're ready, hope is still here — and so are we.
lossPage.resourcesHeading: Singapore support, whenever you need it
lossPage.resourcesIntro: Reaching out is a brave first step. These lines are here for you — tap to call.
lossPage.res_sos_note: 24-hour emotional support if you're in distress.
lossPage.res_aware_note: A safe, confidential space to talk things through.
lossPage.res_hospital_note: Ask your care team about perinatal loss and counselling support — KKH, NUH and others offer it.
lossPage.crisisNote: If you are in crisis or need to talk to someone right now, please call a helpline or your doctor immediately. You deserve support today.
lossPage.verifyNote: Helpline details are indicative and should be re-confirmed before you rely on them. If a number has changed, your GP or hospital can point you to current services.
lossPage.readyBody: Many families go on to try again — in their own time, and often with a little help. If and when you're ready, we'll be right here with clear, gentle information, from natural conception to IVF. There is no pressure and no timeline. Hope is allowed to sit quietly beside grief.
lossPage.closing: You are not forgotten. You are not alone. And whenever you're ready, we'll walk the next step with you. 🤍
